emails.subject: Re: Bloomberg Missing deal
emails.body: Re: Bloomberg Missing deal this is a broker mistake they didn't mean to put out this number, and called us to break the trade they shouldn't be checking it out. thanks, kate Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 02/09/2001 01:11 PM
